title: Top-Down View of Vibrant Plant-Based Meal Preparation on Rustic Wooden Table
description: Widescreen top-down image showcasing a colorful plant-based meal preparation on a rustic wooden table. The scene includes fresh vegetables such as cherry tomatoes, spinach, red onion, bell peppers, avocado, and leafy greens, along with bowls of grains, chickpeas, herbs, and seeds. Natural bright lighting highlights the vivid colors and fresh ingredients arranged neatly for a healthy, wholesome meal.
